items: Casey Mize blanked The Yankees for 7.0 innings, striking out 10 in Detroit's 7-3 win.
Cole Young homered 2 times, driving in 3 as Seattle beat The Angels, 6-2.
Brandon Marsh homered 2 times in Pittsburgh's 11-7 win over Philadelphia.
Cam Smith homered 2 times in Minnesota's 5-4 win over Houston.
Toronto walked off The Mets, 2-1 — one of 3 one-run finishes across the league.
